script:
set +e

echo "== Migrate ashley (lu: ashley) =="
if ! id "ashley" >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo useradd -m -s /bin/bash "ashley" && echo created; fi
sudo usermod -a -G azureuser "ashley"
sudo -u "ashley" ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude "/home/ashley/.claude" 2>/dev/null
sudo -u "ashley" ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude.json "/home/ashley/.claude.json" 2>/dev/null
sudo cp -r /home/azureuser/.azure "/home/ashley/.azure" 2>/dev/null
sudo chown -R "ashley:ashley" "/home/ashley/.azure" 2>/dev/null
sudo systemctl stop "ashley-bot.service" "ashley-responder.service" 2>/dev/null
PORT=$(sudo grep -oE 'PORT=[0-9]+' "/etc/systemd/system/ashley-bot.service" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d= -f2)
echo "  PORT=$PORT"
for f in "ashley-bot.py" "ashley-responder.py" "ashley-graph-token.sh" "ashley-send-to.sh" "ashley-remember.sh" "ashley-install-chat-app.sh" "ashley-pinned.sh" "ashley-download.sh"; do
  [ -f "/home/azureuser/$f" ] && sudo mv "/home/azureuser/$f" "/home/ashley/"
done
[ -d "/home/azureuser/.ashley-bot" ] && sudo mv "/home/azureuser/.ashley-bot" "/home/ashley/"
[ -d "/home/azureuser/ashley-teams-app" ] && sudo cp -r "/home/azureuser/ashley-teams-app" "/home/ashley/"
for f in "/home/ashley/ashley-bot.py" "/home/ashley/ashley-responder.py" /home/ashley/ashley-*.sh; do
  [ -f "$f" ] && sudo sed -i "s|/home/azureuser/\.ashley-bot|/home/ashley/.ashley-bot|g; s|/home/azureuser/ashley-|/home/ashley/ashley-|g" "$f"
done
sudo chown -R "ashley:ashley" "/home/ashley/ashley-bot.py" "/home/ashley/ashley-responder.py" /home/ashley/ashley-*.sh "/home/ashley/.ashley-bot" "/home/ashley/ashley-teams-app" 2>/dev/null
sudo chmod 600 "/home/ashley/.ashley-bot/creds.json" 2>/dev/null
for unit in "ashley-bot" "ashley-responder"; do
  UF="/etc/systemd/system/${unit}.service"
  sudo tee "$UF" > /dev/null <<UNIT
[Unit]
Description=${unit} (per-user Linux account: ashley)
After=network-online.target $(if [ "$unit" = "ashley-responder" ]; then echo "ashley-bot.service"; fi)
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=ashley
WorkingDirectory=/home/ashley
Environment=HOME=/home/ashley
Environment=PATH=/home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin
$(if [ "$unit" = "ashley-bot" ]; then echo "Environment=PORT=$PORT"; fi)
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/ashley/${unit}.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
UNIT
done
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl start "ashley-bot.service" "ashley-responder.service"
sleep 3
echo "  bot=$(systemctl is-active ashley-bot.service) resp=$(systemctl is-active ashley-responder.service)"

echo "== Migrate cameron (lu: cameron) =="
if ! id "cameron" >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo useradd -m -s /bin/bash "cameron" && echo created; fi
sudo usermod -a -G azureuser "cameron"
sudo -u "cameron" ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude "/home/cameron/.claude" 2>/dev/null
sudo -u "cameron" ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude.json "/home/cameron/.claude.json" 2>/dev/null
sudo cp -r /home/azureuser/.azure "/home/cameron/.azure" 2>/dev/null
sudo chown -R "cameron:cameron" "/home/cameron/.azure" 2>/dev/null
sudo systemctl stop "cameron-bot.service" "cameron-responder.service" 2>/dev/null
PORT=$(sudo grep -oE 'PORT=[0-9]+' "/etc/systemd/system/cameron-bot.service" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d= -f2)
echo "  PORT=$PORT"
for f in "cameron-bot.py" "cameron-responder.py" "cameron-graph-token.sh" "cameron-send-to.sh" "cameron-remember.sh" "cameron-install-chat-app.sh" "cameron-pinned.sh" "cameron-download.sh"; do
  [ -f "/home/azureuser/$f" ] && sudo mv "/home/azureuser/$f" "/home/cameron/"
done
[ -d "/home/azureuser/.cameron-bot" ] && sudo mv "/home/azureuser/.cameron-bot" "/home/cameron/"
[ -d "/home/azureuser/cameron-teams-app" ] && sudo cp -r "/home/azureuser/cameron-teams-app" "/home/cameron/"
for f in "/home/cameron/cameron-bot.py" "/home/cameron/cameron-responder.py" /home/cameron/cameron-*.sh; do
  [ -f "$f" ] && sudo sed -i "s|/home/azureuser/\.cameron-bot|/home/cameron/.cameron-bot|g; s|/home/azureuser/cameron-|/home/cameron/cameron-|g" "$f"
done
sudo chown -R "cameron:cameron" "/home/cameron/cameron-bot.py" "/home/cameron/cameron-responder.py" /home/cameron/cameron-*.sh "/home/cameron/.cameron-bot" "/home/cameron/cameron-teams-app" 2>/dev/null
sudo chmod 600 "/home/cameron/.cameron-bot/creds.json" 2>/dev/null
for unit in "cameron-bot" "cameron-responder"; do
  UF="/etc/systemd/system/${unit}.service"
  sudo tee "$UF" > /dev/null <<UNIT
[Unit]
Description=${unit} (per-user Linux account: cameron)
After=network-online.target $(if [ "$unit" = "cameron-responder" ]; then echo "cameron-bot.service"; fi)
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=cameron
WorkingDirectory=/home/cameron
Environment=HOME=/home/cameron
Environment=PATH=/home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin
$(if [ "$unit" = "cameron-bot" ]; then echo "Environment=PORT=$PORT"; fi)
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/cameron/${unit}.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
UNIT
done
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl start "cameron-bot.service" "cameron-responder.service"
sleep 3
echo "  bot=$(systemctl is-active cameron-bot.service) resp=$(systemctl is-active cameron-responder.service)"
